_description: Upstream cohort metadata from the primary model paper (ref 42) and model-inference timing logs. These values describe the source data and infrastructure rather than the 564-case radiologist-reviewed subset bundled in source_data/, so they cannot be derived from the figure-script CSVs.
_model_inference_source: timing_summary.json from the model evaluation run; corresponds to 3600/4.10 = 878 cases/hour
